mapper.select: SELECT la.id, la.phone, la.name, la.identification_number, la.lease_start_date, la.lease_end_date, la.rent, la.deposit, la.status, la.source_type, la.creator_type, la.creator_id, la.application_id, la.auto_generated, la.additional_info, la.create_time, la.update_time, ai.id apartment_id, ai.name apartment_name, ai.district_id, ai.district_name, ai.city_id, ai.city_name, ai.province_id, ai.province_name, ri.id room_id, ri.room_number, pt.id payment_type_id, pt.name payment_type_name, pt.pay_month_count, lt.id lease_term_id, lt.month_count, lt.unit, DATEDIFF(la.lease_end_date, CURDATE()) as remaining_days FROM lease_agreement la LEFT JOIN apartment_info ai ON la.apartment_id = ai.id AND ai.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN room_info ri ON la.room_id = ri.id AND ri.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN payment_type pt ON la.payment_type_id = pt.id AND pt.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN lease_term lt ON la.lease_term_id = lt.id AND lt.is_deleted = 0 WHERE la.id = #{leaseId} AND la.creator_type = 2 AND la.creator_id = #{landlordId} AND la.is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as signing, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as signed, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as canceled, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as expired, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withdrawing, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withdrawn, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as renewing, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 AND DATEDIFF(lease_end_date, CURDATE()) <= 30 AND DATEDIFF(lease_end_date, CURDATE()) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as expiring, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN (2, 5) THEN rent ELSE 0 END) as totalRent, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN (2, 5) THEN deposit ELSE 0 END) as totalDeposit, SUM(CASE WHEN source_type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as newLease, SUM(CASE WHEN source_type = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as renewLease, SUM(CASE WHEN source_type = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as directApplication, SUM(CASE WHEN auto_generated = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as autoGenerated, SUM(CASE WHEN auto_generated = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as manualCreated FROM lease_agreement WHERE creator_type = 2 AND creator_id = #{landlordId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT status, CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN '签约待确认' WHEN status = 2 THEN '已签约' WHEN status = 3 THEN '已取消' WHEN status = 4 THEN '已到期' WHEN status = 5 THEN '退租待确认' WHEN status = 6 THEN '已退租' WHEN status = 7 THEN '续约待确认' ELSE '未知状态' END as statusName, COUNT(*) as count FROM lease_agreement WHERE creator_type = 2 AND creator_id = #{landlordId} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY status HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY status

SELECT source_type as sourceType, CASE WHEN source_type = 1 THEN '新签' WHEN source_type = 2 THEN '续约' WHEN source_type = 3 THEN '直接入住申请' ELSE '未知来源' END as sourceTypeName, COUNT(*) as count FROM lease_agreement WHERE creator_type = 2 AND creator_id = #{landlordId} AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY source_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY source_type

SELECT la.id, la.phone, la.name, la.identification_number, la.lease_start_date, la.lease_end_date, la.rent, la.deposit, la.status, la.source_type, la.creator_type, la.creator_id, la.application_id, la.auto_generated, la.additional_info, la.create_time, la.update_time, ai.id apartment_id, ai.name apartment_name, ai.district_id, ai.district_name, ai.city_id, ai.city_name, ai.province_id, ai.province_name, ri.id room_id, ri.room_number, pt.id payment_type_id, pt.name payment_type_name, pt.pay_month_count, lt.id lease_term_id, lt.month_count, lt.unit, DATEDIFF(la.lease_end_date, CURDATE()) as remaining_days, CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(la.lease_end_date, CURDATE()) <= 30 AND DATEDIFF(la.lease_end_date, CURDATE()) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_expiring_soon FROM lease_agreement la LEFT JOIN apartment_info ai ON la.apartment_id = ai.id AND ai.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN room_info ri ON la.room_id = ri.id AND ri.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN payment_type pt ON la.payment_type_id = pt.id AND pt.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN lease_term lt ON la.lease_term_id = lt.id AND lt.is_deleted = 0 WHERE la.id = #{leaseId} AND la.creator_type = 2 AND la.creator_id = #{landlordId} AND la.is_deleted = 0

SELECT la.id, la.phone, la.name, la.identification_number, la.lease_start_date, la.lease_end_date, la.rent, la.deposit, la.status, la.source_type, la.creator_type, la.creator_id, la.application_id, la.auto_generated, la.additional_info, la.create_time, la.update_time, ai.id apartment_id, ai.name apartment_name, ai.district_id, ai.district_name, ai.city_id, ai.city_name, ai.province_id, ai.province_name, ri.id room_id, ri.room_number, pt.id payment_type_id, pt.name payment_type_name, pt.pay_month_count, lt.id lease_term_id, lt.month_count, lt.unit, DATEDIFF(la.lease_end_date, CURDATE()) as remaining_days FROM lease_agreement la LEFT JOIN apartment_info ai ON la.apartment_id = ai.id AND ai.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN room_info ri ON la.room_id = ri.id AND ri.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN payment_type pt ON la.payment_type_id = pt.id AND pt.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN lease_term lt ON la.lease_term_id = lt.id AND lt.is_deleted = 0 WHERE la.creator_type = 2 AND la.creator_id = #{landlordId} AND la.status = 2 AND la.lease_end_date <= #{expirationDate} AND la.lease_end_date > CURDATE() AND la.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY la.lease_end_date ASC
